overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a stormy coastline at night, then turning inland to traverse grassy meadows and forested hills. The scene features heavy rain, distant windmills, and dramatic mountainous terrain with atmospheric moonlight breaking through clouds.

events.description: character turns left away from the shoreline toward the inland hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky beach with sword on back, rain falling steadily

entered.detail: dark choppy water lapping against the shore with white wave crests
gravel and stone beach stretching along the water's edge
silhouetted windmills visible on the distant coastline through the rain
dense coniferous trees lining the left side of the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dark, stormy shoreline. Waves lap against the rocky beach to the right while windmills stand silhouetted in the distant fog. Rain falls steadily as the character moves forward along the gravel shore before turning inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow between forest and coast

events.description: leaves rocky shoreline and enters grassy inland meadow

agents.ego_description: traversing the grassy field moving away from the coast toward the forested hills

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the open field between shore and forest
large decaying tree trunk lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: Moving inland from the coast, the scene transitions to an open grassy meadow surrounded by coniferous trees. The character walks steadily through the tall grass, leaving the shoreline behind as the terrain gradually begins to slope upward toward the forested hills.

events.description: begins ascending the hillside on a narrow dirt path through dense forest

agents.ego_description: climbing the forested hillside along a winding dirt trail between tall pines

entered.detail: narrow dirt and gravel path winding uphill through the forest
tall pine trees closing in on both sides of the trail
large moss-covered boulders along the left side of the path
distant mountain peak with visible snow visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and steepens as Geralt ascends through dense coniferous forest. Rocky outcrops appear along the left side of the trail while tall pine trees close in, creating a more enclosed feeling. The ground changes from grass to dirt and gravel as the climb continues toward higher elevation.

events.description: emerges from dense forest onto open cliffside with panoramic view of the bay
flock of birds flies across the view over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the bay, observing the distant windmills and coastline

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying over the water toward the distant shore

entered.detail: bay waters visible far below from the cliff height, reflecting moonlight
grassy cliff edge dropping off to the coastal view below

segments.scene_description: Breaking through the tree line, the scene opens to a dramatic cliffside overlook. The coastal waters are visible again far below, with windmills dotting the distant shoreline. Birds fly across the stormy sky as the character continues along the grassy cliff edge, revealing the expansive bay and mountainous landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a dark, stormy shoreline through a dense forest and up to a dramatic cliffside overlook. It begins with Geralt walking along a gravel beach where waves lap against the rocks and windmills stand silhouetted in the distant fog. As the character turns inland, the shoreline recedes and the scene transitions into an open grassy meadow surrounded by coniferous trees. The path then narrows and steepens, shifting from grass to dirt and gravel as the camera ascends through a dense forest of tall pines and rocky outcrops. Finally, the view breaks through the tree line to reveal an expansive bay and mountainous landscape from a high grassy cliff, with birds flying across the stormy sky.
